---
title: "00 · Introduction"
subtitle: "Tier 3 — Algebra II / Geometry / Trigonometry · Grade 10–11 · Quadratics conquered, lines bent into circles, the trigonometric circle, logarithms as inverse exponentials, and the language of probability"
---

## What this tier is for

Tier 1 gave you arithmetic. Tier 2 gave you the language of variables,
equations, and lines. Tier 3 gives you **curves** (parabolas, circles,
and the conic sections), the **trigonometric** functions of angles, the
**inverse** of exponentials (logarithms), and the language of **chance**
(combinatorics and probability).

By the end of Tier 3 you can:

- Solve any quadratic equation by completing the square or the
  **quadratic formula**, and graph parabolas in vertex form.
- Recognise the four **conic sections** as cross-sections of a cone and
  as algebraic curves.
- Manipulate **sequences and series**, including the **infinite
  geometric series**.
- Use **logarithms** to invert exponentials, and solve exponential
  equations.
- Work with **trigonometric ratios**, the **unit circle**,
  fundamental **identities**, and basic trig equations.
- Count outcomes systematically with **combinatorics**, and reason
  about chance with **probability** and discrete distributions.

## The lessons

```{mermaid}
flowchart TD
    A[01 · Quadratic Formula] --> B[02 · Parabolas]
    B --> C[03 · Conic Sections]
    D[04 · Sequences & Series]
    E[05 · Logarithms] --> F[06 · Exp & Log Functions]
    G[07 · Trig Ratios] --> H[08 · Unit Circle]
    H --> I[09 · Trig Identities]
    I --> J[10 · Solving Trig Equations]
    K[11 · Combinatorics] --> L[12 · Binomial Theorem]
    K --> M[13 · Basic Probability]
    M --> N[14 · Conditional Probability]
    M --> O[15 · Discrete Distributions]
```

## Lesson list

1. [**01 · Completing the Square & Quadratic Formula**](01-quadratic-formula/index.qmd)
2. [**02 · Parabolas — Graphing Quadratics**](02-parabola-graphing/index.qmd)
3. [**03 · Conic Sections**](03-conic-sections/index.qmd)
4. [**04 · Sequences and Series**](04-sequences-series/index.qmd)
5. [**05 · Logarithms**](05-logarithms/index.qmd)
6. [**06 · Exponential and Logarithmic Functions**](06-exp-log-functions/index.qmd)
7. [**07 · Trigonometry — The Ratios**](07-trig-ratios/index.qmd)
8. [**08 · The Unit Circle**](08-unit-circle/index.qmd)
9. [**09 · Trigonometric Identities**](09-trig-identities/index.qmd)
10. [**10 · Solving Trigonometric Equations**](10-solving-trig-equations/index.qmd)
11. [**11 · Combinatorics — Counting**](11-combinatorics-counting/index.qmd)
12. [**12 · The Binomial Theorem**](12-binomial-theorem/index.qmd)
13. [**13 · Basic Probability**](13-basic-probability/index.qmd)
14. [**14 · Conditional Probability and Independence**](14-conditional-probability/index.qmd)
15. [**15 · Discrete Probability Distributions**](15-discrete-distributions/index.qmd)

::: {.callout-note}
This page reflects the snapshot of `_curriculum.yml` at the time of build.
Lesson statuses there are the source of truth.
:::
